Latest news

Munira regularly releases news updates on this section of the website. If you would like to be sent the latest news by email, click here.

To browse the news archive including older articles, view all news.

Latest news

Twickenham loses police counter – Munira says “show us the officers”

Munira called for a “clear and noticeable” increase in police on the streets.

Read more

Munira responds to Government’s bathing water status announcement

Welcomes news that Ham and Kingston is one of 13 proposed spots, but calls for Thames Water’s sewage recycling proposals to be scrapped, saying the two proposals are “fundamentally incompatible”.

Read more

Munira brands Government’s PFAS action plan “underwhelming”

Says the UK needs urgent action, not more “dithering and delay”.

Read more

Munira presses the Government on deportation of Roksana Lecka

Munira has been urgently seeking answers from Ministers, so that the parents and children can be reassured Lecka will not walk free in Poland.

Read more

Munira calls on the Met to sell Teddington Police Station for community benefit

Munira speaks to the BBC outside Teddington Police Station.

Read more

Munira slams Government’s decision to back Heathrow’s third runway proposals

Munira says the choice should not have come down to two rival bids – the choice should be for no third runway at all.

Read more

Munira pledges to fight to make nurseries safe for every child

Munira pledged to push the Government to improve safeguarding for children in nurseries, following the horrific case of abuse at Twickenham Green Montessori, part of the Riverside Nursery group.

Read more

Munira challenges Twickenham police station front counter closures

Munira continues to press the Government, the Metropolitan Police and the Mayor of London on these plans, including raising the issue in Parliament and in the media.

Read more

Munira speaks in debate on boys’ attainment and engagement in education

Too many boys aren’t able to reach their potential at school, which has severe consequences for our society.

Read more

Munira responds to Heathrow third runway proposals

With Heathrow Airport formally submitting its proposals for a third runway on 1 August 2025, Munira issued a statement opposing the plans.

Read more

 

Join 100s of local residents

Subscribe now to join Munira’s mailing list. You can choose to receive info about events, campaigns, or news, and you can unsubscribe at any time.

 

Privacy

Munira Wilson MP is the Member of Parliament for Twickenham. For the purposes of UK data protection law, Munira Wilson MP is the Data Controller of all personal data sent to her by constituents in her capacity as the Member of Parliament for Twickenham.

Follow Munira on Facebook and Twitter

Just to let you know...
This website uses cookies to improve your experience. We'll assume you're ok with this, but you can opt-out if you wish. Cookie settingsAccept
Privacy & Cookies Policy

Privacy Overview

This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these cookies, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities of the website. We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze and understand how you use this website. These cookies will be stored in your browser only with your consent. You also have the option to opt-out of these cookies. But opting out of some of these cookies may have an effect on your browsing experience.
Necessary
Always Enabled
Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. This category only includes cookies that ensures basic functionalities and security features of the website. These cookies do not store any personal information.
Non-necessary
Any cookies that may not be particularly necessary for the website to function and is used specifically to collect user personal data via analytics, ads, other embedded contents are termed as non-necessary cookies. It is mandatory to procure user consent prior to running these cookies on your website.
SAVE & ACCEPT
